scripts.postinstall: corepack pnpm exec prisma generate --schema apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:generate: corepack pnpm exec prisma generate --schema apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:migrate: corepack pnpm exec prisma migrate deploy --schema apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:reset: corepack pnpm exec prisma migrate reset --schema apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:studio: corepack pnpm exec prisma studio --schema apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma
